---
title: "stpolisci"
about: 
  id: heading
  template: jolla
link-external-newwindow: true
---

<!-- :::{#heading} -->
<!-- Welcome. I am a senior undergraduate student at faculty of Law, Doshisha University in Japan. My research interests include Political Behavior, Elections, and Japanese Politics. -->

<!-- ::: -->

<!-- ## Experience -->

<!-- ## Education -->


<!-- :::{.callout-note appearance="default"} -->

<!-- ## News -->

<!-- ::: -->
